mutation.description: replaced int return with 0 for application/Choices::getItemId
replaced return value with "" for application/Choices::getName
replaced int return with 0 for application/Choices::getOption
replaced int return with 0 for application/Choices::getQuantity
replaced int return with 0 for application/Choices::getShipping
replaced int return with 0 for application/Choices::getState
replaced boolean return with false for application/ShoppingCart::checkout
replaced boolean return with true for application/ShoppingCart::checkout
replaced boolean return with true for application/ShoppingCart::checkout
replaced int return with 0 for application/ShoppingCart::getCount
replaced double return with 0.0d for application/ShoppingCart::getRawTotal
replaced return value with null for application/Items::getItem
replaced int return with 0 for application/Items::getMaxId
